cases.title: provider canary ops status allowed
cases.fallback: Run S27-01 with strict provider env and verify credentials/env wiring.

cases.title: medium eval v2 status allowed
cases.fallback: Rebuild dataset v2/taxonomy map and rerun S27-02.

cases.title: schedule wrapper keeps readiness visible
cases.fallback: Run S27-03 manually and inspect fallback readiness source.

cases.title: triage pack keeps rollback command
cases.fallback: Regenerate triage pack and ensure rollback command mapping from canary base.

cases.title: policy drift guard is non-failing by default
cases.fallback: Run S27-05 with baseline update or inspect high-impact drift files.

cases.title: soak result remains actionable
cases.fallback: Increase history window and rerun S27-06 to verify failure streaks.
